name: Skygarden Siege
description: Skygarden Siege is a casual arcade shmup where nature fights back against the Iron Fleet. Take control of a Skygarden guardian ship, dodge enemy attacks and defend the floating gardens from mechanical invaders. Collect Light Blossoms, unlock upgrades and push deeper into the conflict between nature and machine.
instructions: Touch - Swipe to Move Mouse - Move Keyboard - W A S D or Arrow Keys and Space to Shoot Defeat all enemies in each stage to progress
